prompt:
A rigid sealed drum used for neutralization residue storage, shown in a clean industrial corner of a lab or workshop with secure lid hardware and a simple utilitarian form. Emphasize sealed containment and orderly waste handling, not melodramatic hazard theater.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft industrial lighting, realistic plastic or coated-metal textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the drum centered and uncluttered.
